title: Creamy Cheese Soup
description: A rich and creamy soup made with cheese and a touch of liquid for a smooth texture. Perfect for a cold winter day.
instructions: Melt the butter or heat the liquid in a pan over medium heat.
Add the cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
Add the soup and stir to combine.
Add the creamy and stir to combine.
Simmer for 5-7 minutes or until heated through.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
